reading.title: Reading: Maybe or maybe not
reading.passage: It might rain later, so take an umbrella. She could be at home now, but I'm not sure. We might not finish the project on time. The price could increase next month.

questions.question: The writer is certain it will rain.
questions.explanation: "It might rain later" cho thấy không chắc chắn.

questions.question: What might happen with the price?

reading.title: Reading: Plans and wishes
reading.passage: I want to learn a new language this year. He plans to study abroad next year. She decided to apply for the job. We hope to see you again soon. They refused to pay more money.

questions.question: He plans to study abroad.
questions.explanation: "He plans to study abroad next year."

questions.question: What did they refuse to do?
